mapper.insert:
insert into product_spec (product_id, spec_name, spec_value, spec_price, spec_stock) values
(#{productSpec.productId},#{productSpec.specName},#{productSpec.specValue},#{productSpec.specPrice},#{productSpec.specStock})
mapper.delete:
delete from product_spec where product_id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select * from product_spec where product_id in
#{productId}
